title: (10 Pack, 24oz) Round Plastic Meal Prep Containers - Reusable BPA Free Food Containers with Airtight Lids - Microwavable, Freezer and Dishwasher Safe
features: CAPACITY: Set of 10 round food containers with 1-litre volume each, perfect for portioning and storing meals throughout the week
DURABILITY: Made from high-quality, BPA-free plastic that maintains structural integrity through multiple uses and washings
LEAK-PROOF DESIGN: Secure-fit lids with airtight seal prevent spills and keep food fresh longer during storage and transport
VERSATILE USE: Microwave, freezer and dishwasher safe containers suitable for both hot and cold food storage
STACKABLE STORAGE: Space-saving design allows for efficient stacking when filled or empty, with clear lids for easy content identification
description: Transform your meal planning routine with these practical Efforias food containers. Perfect for portion control and weekly meal preparation, this set of stackable containers helps you organise your meals efficiently. Each container features a secure, transparent lid that allows you to easily identify contents, whilst the durable black base is suitable for both hot and cold foods. The containers are designed for convenient stacking to maximise storage space in your refrigerator. Ideal for preparing lunches, dinners, or portioning out snacks, these versatile containers can help streamline your daily food preparation. The robust construction ensures they maintain their quality through regular use, and they're suitable for microwave reheating. These containers make meal preparation straightforward and organised, whether you're planning your workweek lunches or storing leftovers. Their practical design allows for easy cleaning and storage, making them an essential addition to any kitchen.
